retry_reason: The put operation always succeeds; the skb reference is always consumed, so no retry is possible or needed.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that unconditionally consumes the reference on the skb after attempting multicast forwarding via batadv_mcast_forw_packet. On success, the skb is freed via consume_skb; on error, it is freed via kfree_skb. The caller must not use the skb after calling this function, as ownership is transferred and the reference is released. The return value indicates forwarding success, not refcount status.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to consume the skb reference after forwarding attempt, using either consume_skb (success) or kfree_skb (error). The only non-refcount logic is the conditional return value check, which is negligible.
